full_text:
Liu Zan 劉瓚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zan (劉瓚)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Liu Shan’s fourth son. Given his fiefdom in 256 but said to be of unremarkable talent. Liu Zan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
